sections.title: ஆங்கிலம் (English) - Grammar Focus
sections.content: Parts of Speech, Tenses, and Vocabulary are key areas. Focus on Synonyms and Antonyms from 6th-8th standards.

questions.question: Choose the correct synonym for the word "Splendid":
Choose the correct antonym for the word "Ancient":
questions.ex: Ancient means 'Old', so the antonym is 'Modern'.

questions.question: What is the plural form of "Syllabus"?
Add a suitable prefix to the word "Polite":
Identify the appropriate Question Tag: "Let us go for a walk, ______?"
Fill in the blank: "He has been living here ______ 2010."
questions.ex: Use 'since' for a point in time.

questions.question: Choose the correct article: "He is ______ honest man."
questions.ex: Honest starts with a vowel sound (o), so use 'an'.

questions.question: Identify the tense: "I have completed my homework."
Change into Passive Voice: "They are building a house."
options: A house is built by them.
A house was being built by them.
A house is being built by them.
A house has been built by them.

questions.question: Identify the pattern: "The teacher gave the students a test."
questions.ex: Subject + Verb + Indirect Object + Direct Object.

questions.question: Choose the comparative degree: "Gold is ______ than silver."
questions.ex: Use 'more' for comparison of long adjectives.

questions.question: Meaning of Idiom: "Once in a blue moon":
Choose the correct homophone: "I want a ______ of cake."
Join using relative pronoun: "This is the boy. He won the race."
options: This is the boy who won the race.

questions.question: Identify the figure of speech: "She is as brave as a lion."
Phrasal Verb for "tolerate":
questions.ex: Put up with means to tolerate.

questions.question: Identify the plural of "Child":
suitable modal verb: "You ______ wear a helmet while riding."
Pick out the correct spelling:
questions.ex: Correct spelling has double c and double m.

questions.question: Syllabification of "Beautiful":
Appropriate Conjunction: "______ he was sick, he attended the meeting."
Figure of speech: "The wind whispered through the trees."
questions.ex: Giving human traits to non-human things.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: "If I were a bird, I ______ fly."
suitable collective noun: "A ______ of bees."
questions.ex: A group of bees is called a swarm.

questions.question: Find the error: "One of the boys are missing."
questions.ex: Should be 'is' because the subject is 'One'.

questions.question: Part of speech of *beautifully*: "She sings *beautifully*."
Which is a Compound Word?
Statement into exclamatory: "It is a very beautiful flower."
options: What a beautiful flower it is!

questions.question: reflexive pronoun: "She cut ______ while chopping."
Rhyming scheme of the lines (deep, keep, sleep, sleep):
